contract.promotion: Experimental candidates are concept art until copied into the production prompt ledger and background presets.
notes: These prompts explore more expressive Lupi environment directions.
Keep the center readable for molecular geometry.
Avoid literal foreground subjects, text, logos, hard frames, circular masks, repeated tiles, and mirrored quadrants.

global_positive: wide full-bleed rectangular environment texture, true 2:1 aspect ratio, continuous horizontal wrap, centered calm viewing field, premium scientific visualization background for a molecular dynamics viewer, strange elegant material science atmosphere, cinematic but quiet, high detail at the periphery, low visual noise in the center, physically plausible soft lighting, no foreground subject, no single centered object
global_negative: text, letters, watermark, logo, signature, people, face, body, animal, product photo, object in foreground, planet, moon, orb, sphere, ring, bullseye, black hole, repeated tile, mirrored quadrant, duplicate motif, duplicate circles, fisheye circle, oval mask, circular mask, white background, white margin, page, cutout, frame, border, square crop, portrait crop, vertical crop, split image, visible seam, hard left edge, hard right edge, distorted horizon, overexposed center, blurry, low resolution, jpeg artifacts
